$schema_note: Per-template manifest. The dashboard scans dashboard/templates/<NAME>/manifest.json and aggregates all entries it finds. Add a new template by dropping a .indd into the repo-root templates/ directory and creating a sibling folder here with this shape.
label: 18 Tiles Template with defaults along with Price and Status fields
static_frames_note: 18 tiles split 3 cols x 3 rows per page across 2 pages. page_title and page_tagline appear once on each page; the bridge fans page-level overrides to all matching frames so both pages stay in sync. Static frames (agent name plates, contact lines, branding/logo, decorative shapes, tile background rects named tile_N) are managed in InDesign directly.
